title: DCP ReviewRequest
description: A record that a review was requested and, over time, its outcome. DCP grants no approval authority and gates nothing: a status of 'approved' is a record that an approval event occurred, NOT an authorization to proceed. A separate system decides what to do with that record.

review_type.description: Vocabulary: code, architecture, security, design, general. Tolerate-and-pass unknown values.

status.description: Record vocabulary: requested, in_review, approved, changes_requested, rejected, cancelled. Tolerate-and-pass unknown values.

requested_reviewers.description: Descriptive, UNTRUSTED project metadata. Conveys NO identity, authority, obligation, or authorization. Free-form opaque labels; never authenticated principals and never a work assignment.
